title: BlurryStudio
notes: Phone photo of a hand-drawn studio. Kitchen (10x10) and Living-Area (12x20) dimensions are visible but low-contrast (confidence ~0.6). Bath dimensions are illegible in the source, so size is omitted (room.confidence 0.4); the generator falls back to the bathroom default. Per references/image-extraction.md, dimensions that cannot be read are NOT invented — confidence is lowered and the default is allowed to fill in. Layout positions are inferred from the source: Kitchen top-left, Bath bottom-left, LivingArea spans the right side. Entry door is the arc on the south wall of LivingArea.
